name: horizon-mfe
description: A lightweight, zero-dependency micro-frontend framework with JS sandbox, CSS isolation, keep-alive, and framework adapters

scripts.build:adapters: pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/react" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/vue" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/solid" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/svelte" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/ember" build
scripts.build: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:adapters && pnpm build:bundle
scripts.build:examples: pnpm build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/react" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/vue" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/solid" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/svelte" build && pnpm --filter "horizon-mfe/ember" build
scripts.example:vanilla: pnpm run build:examples && concurrently -n lib,vanilla,react,vue,solid,svelte,ember,hostVanilla -c cyan,green,blue,greenBright,magenta,yellow,red,gray "pnpm dev" "pnpm --filter child-vanilla dev" "pnpm --filter child-react dev" "pnpm --filter child-vue dev" "pnpm --filter child-solid dev" "pnpm --filter child-svelte dev" "pnpm --filter child-ember dev" "pnpm --filter host-vanilla dev"
scripts.example:react: pnpm run build:examples && concurrently -n lib,vanilla,react,vue,solid,svelte,ember,hostReact -c cyan,green,blue,greenBright,magenta,yellow,red,gray "pnpm dev" "pnpm --filter child-vanilla dev" "pnpm --filter child-react dev" "pnpm --filter child-vue dev" "pnpm --filter child-solid dev" "pnpm --filter child-svelte dev" "pnpm --filter child-ember dev" "pnpm --filter host-react dev"
scripts.example:vue: pnpm run build:examples && concurrently -n lib,vanilla,react,vue,solid,svelte,ember,hostVue -c cyan,green,blue,greenBright,magenta,yellow,red,gray "pnpm dev" "pnpm --filter child-vanilla dev" "pnpm --filter child-react dev" "pnpm --filter child-vue dev" "pnpm --filter child-solid dev" "pnpm --filter child-svelte dev" "pnpm --filter child-ember dev" "pnpm --filter host-vue dev"
scripts.example:solid: pnpm run build:examples && concurrently -n lib,vanilla,react,vue,solid,svelte,ember,hostSolid -c cyan,green,blue,greenBright,magenta,yellow,red,gray "pnpm dev" "pnpm --filter child-vanilla dev" "pnpm --filter child-react dev" "pnpm --filter child-vue dev" "pnpm --filter child-solid dev" "pnpm --filter child-svelte dev" "pnpm --filter child-ember dev" "pnpm --filter host-solid dev"
scripts.example:svelte: pnpm run build:examples && concurrently -n lib,vanilla,react,vue,solid,svelte,ember,hostSvelte -c cyan,green,blue,greenBright,magenta,yellow,red,gray "pnpm dev" "pnpm --filter child-vanilla dev" "pnpm --filter child-react dev" "pnpm --filter child-vue dev" "pnpm --filter child-solid dev" "pnpm --filter child-svelte dev" "pnpm --filter child-ember dev" "pnpm --filter host-svelte dev"
scripts.example:ember: pnpm run build:examples && concurrently -n lib,vanilla,react,vue,solid,svelte,ember,hostEmber -c cyan,green,blue,greenBright,magenta,yellow,red,gray "pnpm dev" "pnpm --filter child-vanilla dev" "pnpm --filter child-react dev" "pnpm --filter child-vue dev" "pnpm --filter child-solid dev" "pnpm --filter child-svelte dev" "pnpm --filter child-ember dev" "pnpm --filter host-ember dev"
scripts.publish: pnpm run build && pnpm pack && pnpm publish horizon-mfe-*.tgz && rm -f horizon-mfe-*.tgz
